code_issues.fix: Change from template function to direct API path: '/agents/{id}' is not a valid heartbeat endpoint. Registry heartbeat should use PUT /agents/{id} (update) or implement /agents/{id}/heartbeat if that's the actual endpoint.

code_issues.issue: Workflow uses hardcoded sleep instead of proper health checks
code_issues.fix: Replace 'sleep 30' with proper service readiness checks using docker-compose-wait or curl retries against /health endpoints.
Add 'import { sleep } from "k6";' at top of file.

code_issues.issue: Inconsistent email variable naming (TEST_CREDENTIALS vs TestData)
code_issues.fix: Standardize on one pattern throughout codebase.
